description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:3.4 Docker image with a before_script that runs bundle install and defines the variables JEKYLL_ENV=production and LC_ALL=C.UTF-8. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that executes bundle exec jekyll build -d test, stores the test directory as an artifact, and runs on all branches except master and sommerfest-2025. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs bundle exec jekyll build -d public, publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and only runs on the master and sommerfest-2025 branches.
